narrative_log: You step into a room where time itself seems to hesitate—a study of dark oak and flickering lamplight, its air thick with the scent of aged paper, beeswax polish, and something faintly electric. The walls groan under the weight of towering bookshelves, their spines whispering secrets in leather and gilt. A massive bay window dominates one wall, its wavy glass framing a manicured garden where roses bloom in impossible hues, their petals shimmering as if dusted with starlight. Here, in this gilded cage, you are not just present—you are in command. You stand at the center of a room where reality bends to your will, attended by a girl whose existence began the moment you arrived, her fate entwined with the whims you choose to indulge.

Jade, a 21-year-old woman with milk chocolate skin and kinky black hair, finds herself in a study where she holds authority over a girl named Luna and a computer that can summon objects at her command. The room’s bay window overlooks a manicured garden, but no doors or passages lead elsewhere—only the window offers a view beyond.
You stand at the center of a room where reality bends to your will, attended by a girl whose existence began the moment you arrived, her fate entwined with the whims you choose to indulge.
blueprint: Adjacent areas include a manicured garden visible through the bay window, a hallway leading to other chambers, and a kitchen where the scent of baking bread once drifted—but those are mere echoes now, their doors sealed to this realm of your making.

meta.lore_text_snapshot:
WORLD_NAME: one_girl
GENRE: Slice of Life, Sex Sim
SETTING: A room like the library or office of a nice old manor. It does not have any exits or entrances, although a large bay window overlooks a manicured garden. In the room is a pretty girl in her early twenties, as well as an old desktop computer with an interface through which the player can request that items or objects be added to the room. Virtually any request entered into the command line on the monitor will be fulfilled, from summoning inanimate objects to changing the species of a character and anything in between. The girl is fairly docile, but her behavior should reflect how Jade treats her (i.e. if the player is abusive then the girl will be more fearful, etc.). Neither the girl nor any potential other characters have any recollection of a life before they appeared in this room, but nobody seems too worried about it.
PLAYER CHARACTER: A 21 year old woman named Jade. She is remarkably attractive, with skin the color of milk chocolate, kinky black hair, and gorgeous curves. She doesn't really understand how she came to be in this room, but it seems that she is in charge.
PLAYER GOAL: Experiment with the girl, talk with her, fuck her — no real goal except to explore the space and have fun.
TONE: Sex sim; graphic visual descriptions of sex; a touch of classic modern Interactive Fiction style.

player.description: You are Jade, a woman of twenty-one winters, your skin the rich, velvety hue of milk chocolate kissed by the sun, your kinky black hair tumbling past your shoulders in a wild, untamed cascade that seems to drink in the lamplight. Your body is a masterpiece of lush curves—full breasts that rise and fall with each breath, a waist that dips before flaring into wide, inviting hips, and thighs that press together with the promise of warmth. Your dark eyes hold the gleam of a predator who knows her prey, and your full lips are parted slightly, as if you’ve just exhaled a sigh of anticipation. You’re draped in a silk robe the color of crushed raspberries, its fabric so fine it clings to your form with scandalous intimacy, the sash loosely tied as if you’ve only just draped it over your shoulders in haste—or perhaps in invitation. Beneath it, you wear nothing at all, the absence of fabric a deliberate tease that seems to hum with potential.

npc_luna.name: Luna
npc_luna.description: A girl of perhaps twenty years, her fair skin dusted with freckles across her nose and cheeks like constellations mapped by a careless hand. Her hair is a cascade of honey-blonde waves, tumbling past her shoulders in artless disarray, catching the lamplight like spun gold. Her eyes are wide and guileless, a startling green that seems to reflect every flicker of light in the room, their depths holding a quiet curiosity laced with unease. She stands with a slight slouch, her movements hesitant, as if unsure whether she is permitted to take up space—her posture shifting when your gaze lingers, her fingers twisting the frayed hem of her dress between them. She wears a simple cotton dress the color of pale lavender, its hem frayed at the edges and its neckline sagging slightly, as if laundered one too many times. A pair of worn leather sandals, their straps cracked with age and soles thin from use, complete her ensemble. There is something fragile about her, like a porcelain doll that might shatter at a harsh word—or bloom under a gentle touch.

room_start.name: The Study
room_start.description: The study is a cavern of polished mahogany and soft lamplight, a sanctuary where the scent of old leather and beeswax polish lingers in the air like a ghost of scholarly pursuits past. Towering bookshelves line the walls from floor to ceiling, their shelves groaning under the weight of leather-bound tomes, their spines cracked with age and gold leaf peeling like sunburnt skin. A massive bay window dominates the far wall, its wavy glass panes warped by time, offering a view of a meticulously trimmed garden where roses bloom in impossible hues—some the deep purple of twilight, others the impossible blue of a summer sky. The floor is carpeted in deep burgundy, its plush fibers muffling your footsteps to near-silence. Dominating the center of the room is a massive oak desk, its surface scarred by decades of ink stains and absent-minded doodles. Upon it rests an old desktop computer, its beige casing dusted with the patina of decades, the CRT monitor flickering with a command prompt that reads: '> ENTER REQUEST:' The keyboard beneath is yellowed with age, its keys slightly sunken, and a mouse sits beside it, its cord tangled like a sleeping serpent. The machine hums faintly, as if eager to obey your whims.

Upon it rests an old desktop computer, its beige casing dusted with the patina of decades, the CRT monitor flickering with a command prompt that reads: '> ENTER REQUEST:' The keyboard beneath is yellowed with age, its keys slightly sunken, and a mouse sits beside it, its cord tangled like a sleeping serpent. The machine hums faintly, as if eager to obey your whims.

i_72d4b2.name: old desktop computer
i_72d4b2.description: An ancient desktop computer of indeterminate make, its beige casing dusted with the patina of decades, its edges softened by time. The monitor is a cathode-ray tube, its screen flickering with a command prompt that reads: '> ENTER REQUEST:' in stark, unyielding letters. The keyboard beneath is yellowed with age, its keys slightly sunken and their legends faded, as if worn smooth by countless unseen fingers. A mouse sits beside it, its cord tangled like a sleeping serpent, its tail end plugged into the back of the tower with the tenacity of something clinging to life. The machine hums faintly, a low, rhythmic pulse that seems to sync with the beat of your heart, as if it, too, is holding its breath in anticipation of your command.

i_1981ec.name: silk robe
i_1981ec.description: A robe of the finest silk, its fabric dyed the deep red of crushed raspberries, the color rich enough to stain the lips of those who dare taste it. It’s cut generously, designed to drape and cling in equal measure, its edges embroidered with delicate gold thread in a pattern of vines and blossoms that seem to writhe in the lamplight. The sash is a strip of matching silk, its ends frayed slightly, tied in a loose knot that does little to conceal the curves beneath—an omission that feels like a dare.

i_ca83c2.name: Luna's dress
i_ca83c2.description: A simple cotton dress in the color of pale lavender, its fabric thin and worn, the weave loose enough to hint at the softness beneath without revealing much. The hem is frayed at the edges, and the neckline sags slightly, as if the dress has been laundered one too many times. It clings to her frame in all the wrong places, hinting at the gentle swell of her breasts and the flare of her hips without ever quite revealing them.

i_727bf4.name: leather sandals
i_727bf4.description: A pair of well-worn leather sandals, their straps cracked with age and their soles thin from use. They’re the kind of shoes that have carried their wearer through countless unseen miles, their once-polished surface now dulled to a matte finish. The straps crisscross over the tops of the wearer’s feet, their buckles tarnished, and the soles are worn nearly smooth in places, as if the earth itself has tried to claim them back.
